message:
style(stdlib_abi): collapse ABORT_RECURSION_DEPTH to a single-line static

Pure rustfmt normalization. The ABORT_RECURSION_DEPTH atomic counter
declaration had been split across two lines:

    static ABORT_RECURSION_DEPTH: std::sync::atomic::AtomicU32 =
        std::sync::atomic::AtomicU32::new(0);

which fits on one line under rustfmt's default 100-col heuristic, so
rustfmt prefers the single-line form. No behavioural change — the
counter's initial value (0), atomic type, and all call sites remain
untouched. Brings the file back to a clean `cargo fmt --check`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
